what: Opened governance_gate_live_demo.ipynb in Colab via Playwright MCP and captured full 17-cell accessibility snapshot, confirming notebook identity and exact failure points.

evidence_captured.page_title: SCBE Governance Gate - Live Demo API - Colab
evidence_captured.execution_state: all cells show [ ] — never run in this browser session
evidence_captured.preview_mode: GitHub preview (read-only until Copy to Drive or sign-in)

why.identity_confirmed: Page title matches notebook's first markdown cell — this IS the Colab target.
failure_points_located: Cell 4 line ~7: sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(REPO_DIR, 'src')) — CLAUDE.md warns this triggers symphonic_cipher dual-package collision
Cell 12 line 1: NGROK_AUTH_TOKEN = '' — blank, ngrok.connect() will ValueError without it
non_failures: 3 console errors are 401 auth from colab.clients6.google.com (UserInfoService) and play.google.com/log — these are browser-side 'not signed into Google' signals, NOT notebook execution errors
Imports resolve structurally: src.governance.runtime_gate and src.video.dye_injection both exist on polly-nav-clean with expected symbols
why.fix_strategy_selected: Option A: preventive local fix of notebook + commit + push before user re-opens. Two known-broken issues can be fixed deterministically from static analysis without requiring Google sign-in.
